scripts.dev: npm run build -w @ayatopos/shared && concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @ayatopos/api" "npm run dev -w @ayatopos/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ayatopos/shared && npm run build -w @ayatopos/api && npm run build -w @ayatopos/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ayatopos/shared && npm run build -w @ayatopos/shared && npm run test -w @ayatopos/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ayatopos/shared && npm run typecheck -w @ayatopos/api && npm run typecheck -w @ayatopos/web
